hero.title: Build real skills. Get hired faster.
hero.subtitle: Explore free, hands-on career paths across the most in-demand trades (including plumbing, electrical, beauty, carpentry and more) built by Fixam.

carousel.title: Explore our free career paths
carousel.subtitle: Learn by doing with interactive, bite-sized tasks structured for the professional trade industry.

howWorks.title: How Fixam Career Path works
howWorks.subtitle: Our career paths build real-life skills for real-life roles, offering a window into the trade and a preview of their day-to-day. Fixam career paths are 100% free, open access and self-paced.
howWorks.step1: Sign up and pick a skill category
howWorks.step2: Work through real tasks and lessons at your own pace
howWorks.step3: Compare your work with model answers and get feedback
howWorks.step4: Earn your certificate and get matched with clients on Fixam

featured.title: Fixam Skill Categories
featured.subtitle: Get certified in specific skills that clients worldwide are looking for right now.

testimonials.title: Too good to be true? Hear from real providers

provider1.quote: "The electrical tasks were very practical. The feedback model showed me exactly how to organize my toolbox and check safety ground connections properly."
provider1.name: Jean-Pierre T.

provider2.quote: "I learned professional home spa sanitization and setup. My clients notice the difference and my ratings went from 4.2 to 4.9 stars!"
provider2.name: Fabiola M.

provider3.quote: "The safe moving and logistics lesson saved my back. I used to get tired easily, but now I lift and organize packing boxes like a true professional."
provider3.name: Emmanuel N.

mission.title: We believe skilled work deserves real recognition.
mission.subtitle: Fixam helps local independent pros build verified records of excellence, unlocking better paying jobs and trusted client connections.

footer.tagline: Empowering trade professionals with skills, certifications, and high-paying jobs.

providersPage.heroTitle: Grow your business as a verified pro.
providersPage.heroSubtitle: Demonstrate your trade skills, earn official Fixam digital badges, and win high-paying contracts from premium clients in your area.
providersPage.benefit1Desc: Display credentials on your profile. Verified badges tell clients you are a qualified expert before they hire you.
providersPage.benefit2Desc: Providers with completed career paths receive priority matching for premium residential and commercial jobs.
providersPage.benefit3Desc: Review step-by-step diagnostic workflows, material selections, and on-site security standards created by expert trainers.
providersPage.whySubtitle: We bridge the gap between skilled trade professionals and high-end clients.
providersPage.step1Desc: Select your trade category and start completing interactive simulations at your own pace.
providersPage.step2Desc: Solve typical customer problems, compare with expert models, and learn correct safety guidelines.
providersPage.step3Desc: Your badges are automatically displayed on your public Fixam provider profile page.
providersPage.step4Desc: Fixam's dispatch system prioritizes verified providers, sending you better leads and bookings.
providersPage.ctaTitle: Ready to elevate your career status?
providersPage.ctaSubtitle: Join thousands of trade experts who are using Fixam Career Pathways to grow their businesses and earnings.
